title: Amtech C1000 350mm (14") Pipe Wrench
features: DURABLE: This 350mm (14") pipe wrench has drop forged, heat treated steel jaws for durability
VERSATILE: A traditional pattern with serrated jaws, it is ideal for a wide range of plumbing, workshop and other uses
SIZE CAPACITY: 350mm range ideal for plumbing and trade tasks
PRECISION CUTTING: Provides smooth and accurate results
PLUMBING APPLICATIONS: Essential tool for household and trade pipework
